note: Real BIBD SMS collected 2026-07-17. No timestamp in the message — occurredAt comes from receivedAt (heuristic). BIBD truncates merchant names (HUA HO DEPARTME[NT STORE]).
input: Dear Customer, Purchase of BND5.10 at HUA HO DEPARTME, has successfully been made on your card ending with 0298. Thank you for banking with BIBD.
